title: Breakwave Bi Weekly Dry Bulk Report March 14 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi Weekly Dry Bulk Report March 14 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi Weekly Dry Bulk Report March 14 2023
summary:
Main
•Time for a breather to digest recent gains - It was only a month ago that market participants were faced with almost zero spot Capesize rates and dark clouds were gathering over the dry bulk market outlook. Whispers of negative spot rates and zero-strike put options were making the rounds and even the hint of positive talk regarding the future was immediately thrown out as wishful thinking. Fast forward to today, and optimism is abundant.
